title: Onarway Tarpaulin 3m x 4m Thicken Tarpaulin Waterproof Heavy Duty 110GSM with Reinforced Grommets, Tarp Sheet Cover for Multipurpose Outdoor Use, Blue
features: 【Various Sizes】Waterproof Heavy Duty Tarpaulin, 3m x 4m, 110g/㎡, Blue Thicken PE premium quality tarp, which is more sturdy than others.
【Sturdy and Heavy Duty】The PE edge of the tarpaulin built-in thicken and durable rope, reinforced grommet, reusable with long lasting durability.
【Waterproof and Easy to Handle】Waterproof heavy duty tarpaulin, though easy to fold and carry out. Anti-UV, anti-fading and tear resistant.
【All Season Protection】It can be used to cover the roof, hay and debris, or as a daily protection for homes such as garden leisure, dog shed construction and so on.
【Outdoor Use】It can be used to protect plant from early snow accumulation, and it is also an excellent choice for outdoor temporary shelters.
